item.name: ══ PHASE 2: Asset-Only ACTUS Run (derive market-value proceeds) ══

item.name: 2.2 Run Phase 0 — capture events, derive market-value proceeds

exec: pm.test('Phase 0: capture all asset events, derive cash flows', function(){
console.log('━ PHASE 2.2: Asset-Only Run — ' + contracts.length + ' contracts returned');
// ══════ A: Extract events and track units ══════
// BTC CLM: extract IED and PP events
// Track BUY events (payoff > 0.01) BEFORE MD resets remaining
btcUnitsRemaining = 0; // MD = full liquidation of remaining position
console.log('  BTC-CLM: '+evts.length+' events, PP_sells='+pps.length+', PP_buys='+btcBuys.length+', units_net='+btcSalesLog.length);
// Track BUY events (payoff > 0.01) BEFORE MD resets remaining
ethUnitsRemaining = 0; // MD = full liquidation of remaining position
console.log('  ETH-CLM: '+evts.length+' events, PP_sells='+pps.length+', PP_buys='+ethBuys.length+', units_net='+ethSalesLog.length);
// ══════ B: Convert sell maps to arrays ══════
allFlows.sort(function(a,b){ return a.time < b.time ? -1 : a.time > b.time ? 1 : 0; });
// ══════ E: Calculate Realized vs Unrealized P/L ══════
var portfolioRealizedPL = btcRealizedPL + ethRealizedPL + tbillRealizedPL + usdcRealizedPL + cashRealizedPL;
var portfolioUnrealizedPL = btcUnrealizedPL + ethUnrealizedPL + tbillUnrealizedPL + usdcUnrealizedPL + cashUnrealizedPL;
// ══════ F: Build value timelines (for Phase 3 RI registration) ══════
// Simple approximate timelines - Phase 3 just needs non-null data
// Start at $2M, decline as price rises (selling occurs)
var approxValue = 2000000 * (1 - progress * 0.5); // Decline 50% over simulation
return {time: c.time, value: Math.round(c.value + btcApprox + ethApprox)};
console.log('  ┌─ REALIZED vs UNREALIZED P/L BREAKDOWN ───────────────────┐');
console.log('  │ Asset    │ Realized P/L   │ Unrealized P/L │ Total P/L     │');
console.log('  PORTFOLIO ROI: ' + (portfolioROI>=0?'+':'') + portfolioROI.toFixed(1) + '% over 6 months');

item.name: ══ PHASE 3: Register Derived Data + Cash Models (JS) ══

exec: // ── Load all derived data from Phase 0 ──
if(!dDeploy||!dBtcSells||!dCash){throw new Error('Phase 0 derived data missing — run Phase 2 first');}
console.log('Phase 3: 12 derived registrations dispatched (5 RI + 7 SCF)');
console.log('✅ lb_tr01: LiquidityBufferModel for consolidated treasury');
console.log('━ Phase 3 complete: 5 derived RI + 7 SCF + 1 LB registered');});
console.log('  13 RI + 2 ADM + 4 ES + 1 PA + 7 SCF + 1 LB');});

console.log('  │ SCF models: deployments, btc/eth proceeds, tbill,');
console.log('  BTC-CLM: ' + evts.length + ' events, PP_nonzero=' + pps.length
console.log('  ETH-CLM: ' + evts.length + ' events, PP_nonzero=' + pps.length
console.log('  ' + id + ': ' + evts.length + ' events (AR inflow), net=$'
console.log('  ' + id + ': ' + evts.length + ' events (AP outflow), net=$'
console.log('  Digital assets: BTC 20 units + ETH 300 units');
